raw_text:
```json
{
  "claims": [
    "The signing of AB 1414 will eliminate the use of outdated court procedures that allowed debt collectors to take advantage of California consumers.",
    "The law will require debt collectors who file lawsuits to use the same tools as other litigants in court.",
    "AB 1414 aims to ensure greater transparency and level the playing field for consumers facing debt collection lawsuits.",
    "Creditors will now have to produce the documents necessary to support their claims in court.",
    "AB 1414 will prevent sophisticated debt collectors from using shortcuts that allow them to evade documentation requirements.",
    "A 2017 Consumer Financial Protection Bureau report found that 29% of white respondents had been contacted about a debt in collection, compared to 44% of people of color.",
    "Debt buyers are the most frequent users of common counts in debt collection cases."
  ]
}
```
